questions.prompt: How many public URLs can a free anonymous workspace hold?
questions.description: You mentioned both "1 at a time" and "maybe 5 total" in the spec.
questions.recommendedAnswer: 5 URLs total per workspace (same cap as documents).

options.label: 1 URL at a time (replace to add another)

questions.prompt: Where should uploaded files be stored?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Supabase Storage — keeps infra in one place with Postgres.

questions.prompt: How should document ingestion run in v1?
questions.description: Parsing, chunking, and embedding can be slow for large PDFs.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Synchronous API route with streaming status updates — simplest for MVP, no extra infra.

options.label: Sync API route + client polling for status
Inngest / Trigger.dev queue from day one

questions.prompt: Which free OpenRouter model should be the default for anonymous users?
questions.recommendedAnswer: google/gemini-2.0-flash-001 — fast, cheap, good at citations.

questions.prompt: Which embedding model for vector search?
questions.recommendedAnswer: openai/text-embedding-3-small via OpenRouter or direct OpenAI — 1536 dims, well supported by pgvector.

questions.prompt: How should the 30 messages/day limit be enforced?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Database-backed counter per workspace — no extra Redis dependency for MVP.

questions.prompt: Which of these should ship in the MVP (not later)?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Export chat and "ask only this source" — both are small and high-value.

questions.prompt: Where should the Next.js app be deployed?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Vercel — natural fit for App Router + AI SDK.

questions.prompt: Anything else to lock before we write the fact sheet?
questions.description: Optional — call out constraints, non-negotiables, or things I got wrong.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Nothing else — proceed with the recommendations above.
